Name: UCameraModifier
Description:
A CameraModifier is a base class for objects that may adjust the final camera properties after
  being computed by the APlayerCameraManager (@see ModifyCamera). A CameraModifier
  can be stateful, and is associated uniquely with a specific APlayerCameraManager.

Variables.Name: bDebug
Variables.Description: If true, enables certain debug visualization features.

Variables.Name: bExclusive
Variables.Description: If true, no other modifiers of same priority allowed.

Variables.Name: Priority
Variables.Description: Priority value that determines the order in which modifiers are applied. 0 = highest priority, 255 = lowest.

Variables.Name: CameraOwner
Variables.Description: Camera this object is associated with.

Variables.Name: AlphaInTime
Variables.Description: When blending in, alpha proceeds from 0 to 1 over this time

Variables.Name: AlphaOutTime
Variables.Description: When blending out, alpha proceeds from 1 to 0 over this time

Functions.Name: BlueprintModifyCamera
Functions.Description:
Called per tick that the modifier is active to allow Blueprinted modifiers to modify the camera's transform. 
	  Scaling by Alpha happens after this in code, so no need to deal with that in the blueprint.

Params.Name: DeltaTime
Params.Description: Change in time since last update

Functions.Name: BlueprintModifyPostProcess
Functions.Description:
Called per tick that the modifier is active to allow Blueprinted modifiers to modify the camera's postprocess effects.
	  Scaling by Alpha happens after this in code, so no need to deal with that in the blueprint.

Params.Name: DeltaTime
Params.Description: Change in time since last update

Params.Name: PostProcessBlendWeight
Params.Description: (out) Blend weight applied to the entire postprocess structure.

Params.Name: PostProcessSettings
Params.Description: (out) Post process structure defining what settings and values to override.

Return.Description: Returns true if modifier is disabled, false otherwise.
Returns the actor the camera is currently viewing.

Params.Name: bImmediate
Params.Description: - true to disable with no blend out, false (default) to allow blend out
